positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial mountain range under a vibrant nebula sky. The mountains are rendered in clean, sharp silhouettes of crystalline quartz and deep slate. The nebula features swirling gradients of deep sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and luminous gold, contrasting sharply with the dark background. Incorporate constellations that mimic geometric art-deco patterns, drawing lines connecting luminous stars. The style should be highly detailed vector art mixed with ethereal watercolor washes, emphasizing strong contrasts, perfect symmetry, and a central focal point suitable for apparel printing. High contrast, vibrant glow, clean lines.
negative: blurry, low detail, noisy, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, messy, messy lines, copyright, trademark, realistic photography, depth of field, gradient artifacts
